debug_info.goal:
case pos
x : IGame
p : Player
y : IGame
hy : y ∈ moves p x
z : IGame
hz : z ∈ @IGame.reverseSet x y p
h : @IGame.Reversible x y p
⊢ ¬@IGame.Reversible (@IGame.unreverse x) (@IGame.unreverse z) p

failed_attempts:
rw [reverseSet_of_reversible h] at hz
    intro h_rev
    have : Reversible x z p := by
      rw [reversible_left, reversible_right] at h_rev ⊢
      cases p <;> obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ := h_rev
      all_goals
        rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
        obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨w', -, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
        exact ⟨w', hw, (unreverse_equiv w').le.trans (hwx.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩
    rw [reversible_left, reversible_right] at h this
    cases p <;> obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ := this
    · exact not_lt_of_mem_moves_left_undominate' hz hw (hwx.trans h.choose_le)
    · exact not_lt_of_mem_moves_right_undominate' hz hw (h.le_choose.trans hwx)
  · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible h] at hz
    subst hz
    intro h_rev
    apply h
    rw [reversible_left, reversible_right] at h_rev ⊢
    cases p <;> obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ := h_rev
    all_goals
      rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
      obtain ⟨w, hw, ⟨w', -, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
      exact ⟨w', hw, (unreverse_equiv w').le.trans (hwx.trans (unreverse_equiv x).le)⟩
